zh.Worcester, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh.Frankley, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton於大約1384年出生在英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利時，他的父親Thomas Littleton27歲，母親Westcote26歲。他於1414年與Elizabeth Littleton在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾福藍可利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年9月1日在英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利享年88歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.Worcester, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh-hans.Frankley, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾福藍可利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton于大约1384年出生在英国武斯特斯爾福藍可利时，他的父亲Thomas Littleton27岁，母亲Westcote26岁。他于1414年与Elizabeth Littleton在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾福藍可利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年9月1日在英国武斯特斯爾福藍可利享年88岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Westcote
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: West, the west, and cote, a cottage, meaning a western cottage

nameMeanings.name: Lyttlelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Littleton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, mostly in southwestern England, named in Old English as ‘small settlement’, from lȳtel ‘small’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton was born about 1384, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, his father, Thomas Littleton, was 27 and his mother, Westcote, was 26. He married Elizabeth Littleton in 1414, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 1 September 1471, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton est né environ 1384, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Littleton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Westcote, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Littleton en 1414, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1471, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton um 1384 in Frankley, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Littleton 27 und seine Mutter Westcote 26. Er hat 1414 in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Littleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1471 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Frankley, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton è nato il circa 1384 nel Frankley, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Littleton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Westcote, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Littleton nel 1414, nel Frankley, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1471, nel Frankley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

ja.Worcester, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスター
ja.Frankley, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリー
ja.Marwood, Devon, England: イギリスデボンマルウッド
ja.Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttleltonが約1384年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Littletonは27歳，母Westcoteは26歳であった。1414年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーでElizabeth Littletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年9月1日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーで88歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton(이)가 대략 1384년 영국 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Littleton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Westcote(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 Elizabeth Littleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 9월 1일 영국 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton nasceu aproximadamente 1384, em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Littleton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Westcote, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Littleton em 1414, em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1471, em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton родился около 1384 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Littleton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Westcote, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Littleton в 1414 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 1 сентября 1471 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton nació aproximadamente 1384, en Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Littleton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Westcote, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Littleton en 1414, en Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1471, en Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
